PSD-03-276970, PORTION OF LOT D, PSD-03-083079 (AR), COVERED BY TRANSFER CERTIFICATE OF TITLE (TCT) NO. 038-2024019283, WITH A TOTAL AREA OF TWO THOUSAND EIGHT HUNDRED (2,800) SQUARE METERS, MORE OR LESS, SITUATED AT BARANGAY DAANG BAGO, DINALUPIHAN, BATAAN, AND REGISTERED IN THE NAME OF VICTOR A. GADDI, FROM AGRICULTURAL TO COMMERCIAL USE.”

Municipal Ordinance No. 014 - 2026, passed by the Sangguniang Bayan of Dinalupihan, Bataan, entitled "AN ORDINANCE RECLASSIFYING A PARCEL OF LAND (LOT 1-C, OF THE SUBD. PLAN, PSN-03-000152 BEING A PORTION OF LOT 1, BSD-03-001659 (OLT)L.R.C. REC. NO.) COVERED BY TRANSFER CERTIFICATE OF TITLE (TCT) NO. 038-2018005638, WITH A TOTAL AREA OF SIX THOUSAND THREE HUNDRED ELEVEN (6,311) SQUARE METERS, MORE OR LESS, SITUATED AT BARANGAY SAN RAMON, DINALUPIHAN, BATAAN, AND REGISTERED IN THE NAME OF VICTOR A. GADDI, FROM AGRICULTURAL TO COMMERCIAL USE.”

Letter from Hon. Jose Enrique S. Garcia III, Provincial Governor of Bataan, RE: REQUEST FOR A RESOLUTION APPROVING THE TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE PROCESSING SERVICES AGREEMENT BETWEEN THE PROVINCIAL GOVERNMENT OF BATAAN AND PAYNAMICS TECHNOLOGIES INC., AND AUTHORIZING THE GOVERNOR TO ENTER INTO AND EXECUTE THE SAME AND OTHER RELATED AGREEMENTS NECESSARY IN AVAILING PAYMENT PROCESSING SERVICES.

Municipal Ordinance No. 2026-357, passed by the Sangguniang Bayan of Mariveles, Bataan, entitled "AN ORDINANCE ESTABLISHING A NEW BARANGAY HEALTH STATION AT SITIO TACLOBAN, BARANGAY LUCANIN, MARIVELES, BATAAN UNDER THE MUNICIPAL HEALTH OFFICE, PROVIDING FOR ADDITIONAL BARANGAY HEALTH WORKERS, INCORPORATING INTER-GOVERNMENTAL COOPERATION FOR THE MAINTENANCE, SECURITY, AND OPERATIONS OF THE FACILITY IN ACCORDANCE WITH THE UNIVERSAL HEALTH CARE LAW, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES.”

Municipal Ordinance No. 2026-359, passed by the Sangguniang Bayan of Mariveles, Bataan, entitled "AN ORDINANCE GRANTING NEW FRANCHISES FOR THE OPERATION OF MOTORIZED TRICYCLES-FOR-HIRE WITHIN THE JURISDICTION OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF MARIVELES PURSUANT TO MUNICIPAL ORDINANCE NO. 2025-339.”

Municipal Ordinance No. 2026-458, passed by the Sangguniang Bayan of Limay, Bataan, entitled "AN ORDINANCE STRENGTHENING AND INSTITUTIONALIZING THE BARANGAY PRIMARY HEALTH CARE PROGRAM, PROVIDING GUIDELINES FOR THE REGISTRATION AND ACCREDITATION, AND BENEFITS TO BARANGAY HEALTH WORKERS, AND PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR.”

Municipal Ordinance No. 2026-459, passed by the Sangguniang Bayan of Limay, Bataan, entitled "AN ORDINANCE RECLASSIFYING A PARCELS OF LAND FROM AGRICULTURAL TO RESIDENTIAL, WITH AN AREA OF FIVE HUNDRED SIXTY FOUR (564) SQUARE METERS COVERED BY OCT NO. ARP2015000371 AND TWO HUNDRED SIXTY EIGHT (268) SQUARE METERS COVERED BY TCT NO. 038-2015002530, LOCATED IN BARANGAY REFORMISTA, LIMAY, BATAAN, REGISTERED UNDER THE NAME OF MR. ADRIAN P. MARIANO.”

Panukalang Kautusan Blg. 22, Serye 2026, na may pamagat na “ISANG ORDINANSA NA NAGBABAWAL SA PAGSASAMANTALA, MALING PAGGAMIT, AT PAGKAKAKITAAN SA PANGALAN, LARAWAN, KUWENTO, AT KALAGAYAN NG MGA KATUTUBONG AYTA SA PROBINSYA NG BATAAN, NAGTATAKDA NG MALAYA, NAUNA, AT MULAT NA PAHINTULOT AT TRANSPARENCY PARA SA LAHAT NG PROGRAMA AT PROYEKTONG MAY KAUGNAYAN SA MGA AYTA, NAGTATALAGANG PROVINCIAL LEGAL OFFICE BILANG TANGGAPANG NAGPAPATUPAD, AT NAGBIBIGAY NG PARUSA PARA DITO, AT PARA SA IBA PANG LAYUNIN.”(Inihain nina: Kgg. Jomar L. Gaza, J.D. at Kgg. Feliciano G. Magay, Jr.)

Panukalang Kautusan Blg. 23, Serye 2026, na may pamagat na “ISANG ORDINANSA NA NAGTATAGUYOD, NAGPOPROTEKTA, AT NAGPAPANATILI NG BIODIVERSITY SA LOOB NG MGA LUPANG NINUNO NG MGA KATUTUBONG AYTA SA PROBINSYA NG BATAAN, NA KINIKILALA ANG KANILANG KARAPATAN SA LUPANG NINUNO AT TRADISYUNAL NA KAALAMAN, ALINSUNOD SA REPUBLIKA AKTANG BLG. 8371, NAGTATADHANA NG MGA IPINAGBABAWAL AT PINAHIHINTULUTANG GAWAIN, AT NAGTATALAGA NG MGA TANGGAPAN NG PAMAHALAANG PANLALAWIGAN BILANG MGA TAGAPATUPAD, AT PARA SA IBA PANG LAYUNIN. (Inihain nina: Kgg. Jomar L. Gaza, J.D. at Kgg. Feliciano G. Magay, Jr.)
URGENT REQUEST FOR THE ENACTMENT  OF AN ORDINANCE CREATING VARIOUS PLANTILLA POSITIONS IN THE DIFFERENT DEPARTMENTS OF THE PROVINCIAL GOVERNMENT OF BATAAN.

PROPOSED ORDINANCE NO. 24 S. 2026, ENTITLED "AN ORDINANCE CONSOLIDATING, UPDATING AND INSTITUTIONALIZING THE RICE SUBSIDY PROGRAM OF THE PROVINCE OF BATAAN, REPEALING SANGGUNIANG PANLALAWIGAN RESOLUTION NOS. 117 SERIES OF 2006, 37 SERIES OF 2007, 44 SERIES OF 2016, 185 SERIES OF 2016, 151 SERIES OF 2017, AND 285 SERIES OF 2020, AND PROVINCIAL ORDINANCE NO. 05 SERIES OF 2025, AND PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR."
Supplemental Budget No. 04 Series of 2026 of the City of Balanga, Bataan, involving a total appropriation of Php8,300,000.00 under City Appropriation Ordinance No. 04 S. 2026.
Supplemental Budget No. 05 Series of 2026 of the City of Balanga, Bataan, involving a total appropriation of Php18,654,529.38 under City Appropriation Ordinance No. 05 S. 2026.

Municipal Ordinance No. 531 Series of 2026, passed by the Sangguniang Bayan of Abucay, Bataan, entitled "AN ORDINANCE APPROVING THE RECLASSIFICATION OF LOT NO. 231-D-2 FROM AGRICULTURAL TO RESIDENTIAL USE CONTAINING AN AREA OF 5,043 SQ.M. LOCATED AT BRGY. SALIAN, ABUCAY, BATAAN OWNED BY FELICIDAD E. GARCIA AND DOMINADOR CASTRO.”

Municipal Ordinance No. 532 Series of 2026, passed by the Sangguniang Bayan of Abucay, Bataan, entitled "AN ORDINANCE AMENDING MUNICIPAL ORDINANCE NO. 417, SERIES OF 2023 (ANTI-DISCRIMINATION ORDINANCE OF ABUCAY, BATAAN) TO EXPAND PROTECTION, ESTABLISH THE MUNICIPAL ANTI-DISCRIMINATION BOARD (MADB), PROVIDE CLEAR GRIEVANCE PROCEDURES, AND UPDATE PENALTIES.”

Municipal Ordinance No. 533 Series of 2026, passed by the Sangguniang Bayan of Abucay, Bataan, entitled "AN ORDINANCE FORMALLY RECOGNIZING THE MONTH OF JUNE AS “PRIDE MONTH” IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ABUCAY, MANDATING THE CREATION OF THE MUNICIPAL LLGBTQ+ AFFAIRS COUNCIL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFORE.”

Municipal Ordinance No. 535 Series of 2026, passed by the Sangguniang Bayan of Abucay, Bataan, entitled "AN ORDINANCE INSTITUTIONALIZING LOCAL IMPLEMENTATION OF THE ACADEMIC RECOVERY AND ACCESSIBLE LEARNING (ARAL) PROGRAM PURSUANT TO REPUBLIC ACT NO. 12028, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES.”

Municipal Ordinance No. 536 Series of 2026, passed by the Sangguniang Bayan of Abucay, Bataan, entitled "AN ORDINANCE INSTITUTIONALIZING PROJECT BRIGHT (BARANGAY RESOURCE FOR INTEGRATED GUIDANCE AND HOMEGROWN TUTORING) TO REINFORCE THE ACADEMIC RECOVERY AND ACCESSIBLE LEARNING (ARAL) PROGRAM AT THE BARANGAY LEVEL, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES.”

Municipal Ordinance No. 537 Series of 2026, passed by the Sangguniang Bayan of Abucay, Bataan, entitled "AN ORDINANCE APPROVING THE APPLICATION OF DIONISIO D. TUNGOL FOR THE RECLASSIFICATION OF LOT NOS. 487; 488; 3170 FROM AGRICULTURAL TO RESIDENTIAL USE CONTAINING A TOTAL AREA OF 70,295 SQ.M. LOCATED AT BRGY. LAON, ABUCAY, BATAAN.”

Municipal Ordinance No. 26-020-185, passed by the Sangguniang Bayan of Orion, Bataan, entitled "AN ORDINANCE PRIORITIZING THE GRADUATED 4Ps BENEFICIARIES TO MUNICIPAL GOVERNMENT SERVICES (POST SERVICE INTERVENTIONS) IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ORION, BATAAN.”

LOT 1-A-1-B-4-A AND 1-A-1-B-4-B, BOTH BELONGING TO RENATO B. SABINO M/TO THELMA C. SABINO, HAVING A TOTAL AREA OF 717 SQUARE METERS SITUATED IN BRGY. DAAN BILOLO, ORION, BATAAN, FROM AGRICULTURAL INTO RESIDENTIAL USE.”
